reason: Agent successfully navigated to https://example.com and returned the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with agents list in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260417-013822-wnit" agent in the sidebar - Agent chat view opened with session "Browser Navigation and Page Title Retrieval"
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the message input field - Message displayed in input box, Send button became enabled
Clicked Send button - Message sent, agent status changed to "working", browser preview appeared on right side showing "Example Domain"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent completed in 7 seconds, returned clear response: "The page title is "Example Domain"."

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response explicitly states the page title is "Example Domain", confirming successful browser navigation and title retrieval. Browser preview on right side also shows the actual Example Domain page content.
